changelog:
Fork patches A4 — finish the envelope-cleanup the upstream model was still flagging:
- Removed ThinkingModePrompt entirely. No Anthropic / Bedrock API exposes a token-budget directive in the system prompt; the previous '<thinking_mode>...' tag and the natural-prose 'You may use up to N tokens of internal deliberation' replacement were both fingerprinted as fake harness signals. Reasoning is still surfaced response-side (extractThinkingFromContent + reasoning_content callbacks); the proxy no longer prepends any cue.
- Split applyPromptFilters into applySystemPromptFilters (full chain incl. Claude-Code detection -> backend-prompt replacement) and applyUserMessageFilters (noise stripping only). Earlier revisions ran the full chain on user messages too, which caused 'Help the user with their software engineering task...' to be duplicated when both the system prompt and a user message matched the detector.
- minimalFallbackUserContent changed from '.' to ''. The lone trailing period was also caught by the model as synthetic filler. Empty content is fine because Kiro's structured fields (UserInputMessageContext.ToolResults / Images) carry the meaning when the user-facing prose is empty.

A3:
- Removed --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- boundary markers from outbound payload.
- Stopped synthesizing 'Tool results:' prose preface; structured tool results travel via UserInputMessageContext.ToolResults only.
- Shortened claudeCodeBackendPrompt to a single neutral sentence.
- Tightened isClaudeCodeSystemPrompt to >=1 strong + >=3 total markers.
- Dashboard quotaTotal/quotaUsed now real-time on /admin/api/status.

A2: docker-compose service / container_name renamed to kiro-go-patch; pull_policy: always.

A1: prompt filter logic catches Claude Code 2.x <system-reminder> blocks, x-anthropic-billing-header, ## Environment / ## auto memory; new /v1/responses endpoint (Codex CLI); /v1/models returns canonical Anthropic ids; dashboard refresh.
